mapper.insert:
SELECT EXAM.SEQ_EXAM_KEY_POINT.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO EXAM_KEY_POINT( COURSE_ID, ID, NAME, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY, ENABLED_FLAG, MEMO, STATUS, PARENT_ID )VALUES( #{courseId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1 , #{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.update: UPDATE EXAM_KEY_POINT SET COURSE_ID=#{courseId}, ID=#{id}, NAME=#{name}, LAST_UPDATED_BY=#{lastUpdatedBy}, CREATED_BY=#{createdBy}, MEMO=#{memo}, STATUS=#{status}, PARENT_ID=#{parentId} WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE EXAM_KEY_POINT SET ENABLED_FLAG=0 WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM EXAM_KEY_POINT WHERE ENABLED_FLAG=1 AND PARENT_ID=#{pid}

SELECT ID FROM EXAM_KEY_POINT WHERE ENABLED_FLAG=1 AND PARENT_ID=0 AND COURSE_ID IN
#{item}
